Priya Raghunathan
Senior Data Analyst
EXPERIENCE
Senior Data Analyst — Flipkart | Bengaluru, India | Jun 2021 – Present
• Built self-serve Tableau dashboards tracking GMV, conversion and returns for 11 category teams, cutting ad-hoc requests 38%
• Designed A/B tests for the loyalty relaunch; uplift models in Python raised repeat-purchase rate 9.4%
• Migrated nightly ETL from cron scripts to Airflow with dbt models on BigQuery, reducing pipeline failures 80%
• Presented quarterly insight reviews to VP-level stakeholders across merchandising and pricing
Data Analyst — Swiggy | Bengaluru, India | Jul 2018 – May 2021
• Forecast rider supply with gradient-boosted models, trimming undelivered orders 12% across 60 cities
• Automated weekly business reviews in SQL and Excel, saving the ops team 14 hours every week
• Partnered with marketing on RFM segmentation that lifted coupon ROI 22%
Business Analyst — Mu Sigma | Bengaluru, India | Aug 2016 – Jun 2018
• Delivered churn regression models for a US telecom client, reducing voluntary churn 6%
• Standardised the client reporting stack on Tableau Server, onboarding 35 analysts across three accounts
• Ran SQL training workshops attended by more than a hundred consultants every quarter
